title: 2017 ESL Interclub Final

content:
Another successful season of the Edmonton Squash League wrapped up last weekend, with the Finals taking place at the ESC. Congratulations to our ESC champion teams!

Level 3 Women’s: We are the ESC- Lindsay Buchanan, Heather Sanregret, Angel Yu, Caroline Kirillo, Jennifer Black, Laura Fraser and Brenda Haynes

Level 1 Women’s A Pool: Julie Multamaki

Level 2 Mixed: The Fat and the Furious- Brad Prince, Ross Yaremko, Ryan Musshacher, Alan Ditschun, and AJ Penderson

Level 1 Mixed: Mizuki Crew- Adrian de Vries, Eliot Linklater, Michael Fouts, John de Vries, Mike Mayner and Corey Stewart

Thank you to all the referees who came out to help, and Julia Smith, Louis Wang and the rest of the ESL Board volunteers who continue to keep the league running.

Team registration for the 2017-2018 season will begin in September – if you’re looking for a team then let Jeff know and he will get you sorted out.

2017 Interclub Finals
